cards.question: …hides something surprising under a calm surface?
…you'd trust first in a genuine emergency?
…reminds you of a younger version of yourself?
…could have gotten you to break a rule?
…you'd be most nervous to introduce to your parents?
…seems like they're carrying something they haven't told anyone?
…has a secret that would make a great short story?
…you'd want on your side in an argument you couldn't win?
…has reinvented themselves at least once?
…seems most at ease with who they are?
…you'd want to know the backstory of?
…reminds you of someone you've lost touch with?
…is the most different from what they appear?
…looks like they've made a decision they're still not sure about?
…could have been your closest friend in a different life?
…could have started a cult and genuinely succeeded?
…has the most unread emails right now?
…would go viral on the internet by complete accident?
…would survive the longest if society collapsed?
…has a hobby that would surprise everyone who knows them?
…has a drawer full of things they should have thrown away years ago?
…waited until embarrassingly late to learn something everyone else just knows?
…looks like they'd be the most interesting person at any party they attend?
…has the most complicated relationship with their phone?
…is definitely lying to themselves about something right now?
…would be the last to know they were the villain of the story?
…looks like they'd be brilliant at something completely unexpected?
…would be the main character in a true crime documentary?
…has a secret relationship with someone in the same building?
…would respond best to an unexpected act of kindness right now?
…pulled your attention first?
…seems furthest from home right now?
…looks most at ease with being alone?
…seems to be carrying a decision they haven't made yet?
…reminds you of someone from a different chapter of your life?
…looks like they have a rich inner life no one around them knows about?
…you'd most want to know the story behind?
…seems happiest right now?
…you'd trust immediately, without knowing why?
…looks like they contain a contradiction?
…is the most different from how they want to appear?
…if you had to give them a name right now, what would it be?

title: Deep Cuts
description: Harder questions. For when you're ready.

cards.question: …is most like you when no one's watching?
…looks like they've survived something they never talk about?
…carries a version of themselves they've had to let go of?
…you'd trust with your most embarrassing truth?
…seems like they're only just becoming who they were meant to be?
…if you could give them one thing, what would it be?
…looks like they love something with a quiet, private intensity?
…you'd believe immediately if they said something no one else would?
…seems to be in a version of their life they didn't fully plan for?
…is the hardest to read, and what does that make you feel?
